title: General Department Leadership
content:
MORGAN STATE UNIVERSITY COMPUTER SCIENCE DEPARTMENT LEADERSHIP

DEPARTMENT CHAIR:
The chair of the Computer Science Department at Morgan State University is Dr. Shuangbao "Paul" Wang.
Dr. Paul Wang is the Professor and Chair.
Office: McMechen Hall 507
Phone: (443) 885-4503
Email: shuangbao.wang@morgan.edu
Research interests: quantum cryptography, secure architecture, AI and machine learning, IoT and cyber-physical systems, robotics, and video indexing.

ASSOCIATE CHAIR:
The Associate Chair of the Computer Science Department is Dr. Md Rahman.
He is a Professor and Associate Chair.
Office: McMechen 629
Phone: (443) 885-1056
Email: Md.Rahman@morgan.edu
Research interests: computer vision, image processing, information retrieval, machine learning, and data mining for biomedical applications.

UNIVERSITY PRESIDENT:
The president of Morgan State University is Dr. David K. Wilson.
Dr. David K. Wilson has served as the 12th president of Morgan State University since 2010.
Under his leadership, Morgan State has seen significant growth in enrollment, research funding, and campus development.
Office: Truth Hall
Email: president@morgan.edu

PROVOST:
The provost of Morgan State University is Dr. Hongtao Yu.
Dr. Hongtao Yu serves as Provost and Senior Vice President for Academic Affairs.
The provost oversees all academic programs, faculty affairs, and educational initiatives.
Office: Truth Hall
Email: provost@morgan.edu

SCMNS DEAN:
The Dean of the School of Computer, Mathematical, and Natural Sciences (SCMNS) is Dr. Paul Tchounwou.
Office: Dixon Science Research Center, Room 200
Phone: 443-885-4515
Email: scmns-deans-office@morgan.edu

DEPARTMENT CONTACT:
Address: 1700 E Cold Spring Lane, Baltimore, MD 21251, McMechen 507 Suite
Phone: (443) 885-3962
Email: compsci@morgan.edu
